title: minecraft wob
description: This resource pack changes the textures of certain blocks and items to make the vanilla graphics look more humorous, and it can also be used for PvP.
body:
This resource pack changes the textures of certain blocks and items to make the vanilla graphics look more humorous, and it can also be used for PvP.
🎨 Key Features
Unique "Funny" Style: Redraws textures for certain blocks and items in the vanilla game, giving them a brand new look that is sure to bring laughter. This is more than just a resource pack; it's a "fountain of joy" that will make you smile while you play.
PvP Friendly: Although humorous, it doesn't sacrifice recognizability. While keeping the blocks and items clearly distinguishable, it brings a relaxed and fun atmosphere to your PvP battles.
![羊毛（幸运方块）房间里陈列着不同材质的稿子 剑和它们的原材料](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b33f0e82ef20d317f81a0e1f804850e0987fba1d.png)
Legacy of "Ruo Zhi" and "Mining Draft": Based on the famous "Mining Draft Ruo Zhi," this pack retains its essence while adding innovative twists. It's a must-have for fans!
❓ Why Choose This Resource Pack?
Are you tired of generic realistic or HD texture packs? Do you want to find a bit of fun in the midst of intense PvP combat? This pack is made for you!
![爆炸的苦力怕有herobrine的头](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/290e519dd956e9b5a6f3a277811a04c245a0e14f.png)
What does it do? It changes your perception of vanilla Minecraft, filling the process of mining, building, and fighting with surprises.
![作者和僵尸（作者）用法棍打架](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a9f4bfc4b1577bdaa13e833e7e9443529695e14.png)
Who is it for? It's for players who want to have fun and stand out from the crowd, especially fans of "Mining Draft Ruo Zhi" and PvP enthusiasts.
![bro在用“急迫”木镐挖“钻石”矿](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f887934beccfb07f9db641121a49aadd3864e644.png)
🛠️ Installation & Usage
适用版本 (Game Version): [1.21.6~1.21.11]
安装方法 (Installation Method): Simply place the downloaded .zip file into your resourcepacks folder, then activate it in the game settings.
![哈哈哈这个村民](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6d8aa0eead83fbcc482ec6fb5c63d1953f3a003.png)
[I am a Chinese player. I used a translator to fill out this description, so there might be some translation errors. Please bear with me.]
